description:
CCleaner for PC helps you clean up your Windows computer, optimize performance, and maintain your online privacy.

Inject instant speed into your machine by freezing resource-hogging apps and programs and by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors, broken settings, and update drivers to improve stability. Protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history.
Helping you to keep your PC running fast and smooth
- Faster Disk Analyzer selections. Selecting and deselecting items in Disk Analyzer is now much more responsive, even on large scans.
- Smoother Duplicate Finder scans. We’ve fixed lags and unresponsive buttons so starting and managing scans feels snappier.
Expanding our cleaning
- Better support for special-character folders. Custom Clean and Files to clean now handle folders with accented or special characters without crashing and clean them as expected.
Enhancing our Software Updater
- Clearer offline messages. Software Updater now shows the right “no internet” message when you try to scan while offline.
- More reliable driver updates. Driver Updater no longer gets stuck when updating, so driver installs complete more smoothly.
- More responsive Software Updater. We’ve fixed issues where Software Updater controls could appear or feel unresponsive.
Simplifying the app
- Easier Beta opt-in and opt-out. You can now join or leave the CCleaner Beta program directly from Settings.
- More consistent light and dark themes. Your chosen theme is applied more reliably across different parts of the app.
Taking the hassle out of PC maintenance
- Shutdown countdown now behaves correctly. The “shutdown after clean” timer no longer pauses at a negative number before your PC powers off.
- Interface alignment issues fixed. We’ve corrected a display shift so screens now appear where you expect them.

Keeping you safe
- Warnings and highlights are easier to see. We’ve adjusted some colors and layouts so important icons and messages stand out more clearly.
Fixing bugs
- Cloud Drive Cleaner icon fix. We’ve corrected an icon color so links are clearer for free users.
- Onboarding alignment on larger screens. The menu info box now points to the right place on high-resolution displays.
- Right-to-left language improvements. The welcome tour tooltip now lays out correctly in right-to-left languages.
- Duplicate Finder layout and buttons fixed. Row spacing is now consistent, and the “Choose more files”, “Done”, and “View details” buttons work as expected after deleting duplicates.
